title: Financial Aid Offices
description: The offices responsible for financial aid.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the financial aid office.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the financial aid office.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the financial aid office.

addressLines.title: Address Lines
addressLines.description: The address lines of the financial aid office location.

city.title: City
city.description: The city of the financial aid office location.

state.title: State
state.description: The state of the financial aid office location.

postalCode.title: Postal Code
postalCode.description: The postal code of the financial aid office location.

aidAdministrator.title: Aid Administrator
aidAdministrator.description: The name of the financial aid administrator for the office.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The phone number of the financial aid office.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the phone.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the phone when multiple phones share the same primary number.

fax.title: Fax
fax.description: The fax number of the financial aid office.

number.title: Number
number.description: The number assigned to the fax line.

extension.title: Extension
extension.description: The extension used to connect to the fax line when multiple lines share the same primary number.

emailAddress.title: Email Address
emailAddress.description: The e-mail address of the financial aid office.
